title: galium obliquum var. centroniae
intro: Galium obliquum var. centroniae, also known as Centronia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Galium obliquum var. centroniae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Galium obliquum var. centroniae is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used in herbal remedies.
